findings.evidence: `rg -n "normalizerEquivOfNormal" code mathlib -g '*.lean'` finds only lines 157, 163, 165, and the construction use at 179 in this new file.
findings.fix: Make these helpers private or fold them into the definition/proof of `normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal`; keep the public API at the quotient map/equivalence plus their representative lemmas.
findings.issue: `normalizerEquivOfNormal` and `normalizerEquivOfNormal_map_subgroupOf` are public raw normalizer-to-ambient helpers used only to construct `normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal`, expanding the surface beyond the normalizer-quotient API.

summary: The quotient API is mostly characterized, but the PR still exposes construction scaffolding for the normal-case equivalence that is not part of the named downstream surface.
